paavan_purani.name: Paavan Purani
paavan_purani.summary:
Paavan Purani is steadily building a competitive resume, with 17 entries across 7 tournaments. Every tournament adds experience, every match sharpens the game, and the results will follow the effort.

Paavan is a versatile competitor who takes the court in singles, doubles, and mixed doubles. That willingness to compete across all disciplines builds a well-rounded game that many specialists simply cannot match.

Paavan has competed at both U15 and U17, showing the adaptability needed to thrive as the competition grows fiercer with each age group.

With 3 seasons of competitive experience under the belt, Paavan brings the kind of tournament-tested composure that only comes from years of stepping onto the court and competing against the best.

paige_gu.name: Paige Gu
paige_gu.summary: Paige Gu is just getting started on the junior badminton circuit with 1 tournament entry. Every champion's story has a beginning, and this is Paige's.

paige_xu.name: Paige Xu
paige_xu.summary:
Paige Xu has reached the Finals 2 times, proving the ability to compete at the very highest level. With 35 entries across 12 tournaments, Paige is building a body of work that points toward big things ahead.

A true triple-threat, Paige competes across singles, doubles, and mixed doubles — boasting a singles best of #4, a doubles best of #2, a mixed doubles best of #4. The ability to excel in all three disciplines reveals a player with both the individual brilliance to dominate rallies and the court sense to thrive with a partner.

Paige has demonstrated remarkable doubles adaptability, partnering with 13 different players across the career. Key partnerships:
  • Eric Zhun Hu — a trusted XD partner (6 events, best result: #5)
  • Sahana Samarthy — a trusted GD partner (4 events, best result: #2)
  • Janelle Zhou — 3 events in GD, best: #3

A veteran of the junior circuit, Paige has competed across U13, U15 and U17, accumulating invaluable experience at every age group. That depth of competitive history is an asset that younger opponents simply cannot replicate.

With 4 seasons of competitive experience under the belt, Paige brings the kind of tournament-tested composure that only comes from years of stepping onto the court and competing against the best.

phillip_you.name: Phillip You
phillip_you.summary:
Phillip You is a U.S. Junior National Champion — a distinction that places Phillip among the finest junior players in the country. With 5 career tournament victories across 23 tournaments and 64 total entries, this is a player who consistently rises to the biggest moments.

A true triple-threat, Phillip competes across singles, doubles, and mixed doubles — boasting 1 singles title, 3 doubles titles, 1 mixed doubles title. The ability to excel in all three disciplines reveals a player with both the individual brilliance to dominate rallies and the court sense to thrive with a partner.

Signature achievements: National Champion in BD U13 • 1 ORC title (across 1 tournament).

Phillip has demonstrated remarkable doubles adaptability, partnering with 17 different players across the career. Key partnerships:
  • Felicia Ho — a trusted XD partner (8 events, best result: #2)
  • Kayden Hossain — a trusted BD partner (4 events, best result: #2)
  • Jacob Zhou — 4 events together in BD, producing an outstanding 2 titles

Having moved up to U17, Phillip is navigating the challenge of tougher competition at the higher age group. The adjustment period is natural — and with the pedigree Phillip brings, a return to the top is a matter of when, not if.

A veteran of the junior circuit, Phillip has competed across U11, U13, U15 and U17, accumulating invaluable experience at every age group. That depth of competitive history is an asset that younger opponents simply cannot replicate.

Phillip has competed across 5 different regions of the country (NE, NW, NorCal, SoCal, South), demonstrating a willingness to travel and test the game against diverse styles of play from coast to coast.

With 7 seeded entries across the career, Phillip consistently earns the respect of tournament committees — a testament to the results put up on the court.

With 5 seasons of competitive experience and 5 titles to show for it, Phillip is a battle-hardened competitor whose journey is a testament to what dedication, talent, and love for the game can produce.

prajwal_avadhani.name: Prajwal Avadhani
prajwal_avadhani.summary:
Prajwal Avadhani is a rising force in junior badminton, already collecting 2 tournament titles among 73 career entries across 28 tournaments. The trajectory is unmistakable — this is a player whose best chapters are still being written.

A true triple-threat, Prajwal competes across singles, doubles, and mixed doubles — boasting a singles best of #3, 2 doubles titles, a mixed doubles best of #2. The ability to excel in all three disciplines reveals a player with both the individual brilliance to dominate rallies and the court sense to thrive with a partner.

Signature achievements: 2 ORC titles (across 2 tournaments).

Prajwal has demonstrated remarkable doubles adaptability, partnering with 17 different players across the career. Key partnerships:
  • Uddhav Kasarabada — 11 events, 1 title together in BD/U15/U17
  • Manas Chintala — a trusted BD partner (9 events, best result: #2)
  • Vignesh Jami — 4 events, 1 title together in BD

The 2025-2026 season has been a step up, with 1 title across 3 tournaments — an improvement that shows Prajwal is still ascending. The best may yet be ahead.

A veteran of the junior circuit, Prajwal has competed across U13, U15, U17 and U19, accumulating invaluable experience at every age group. That depth of competitive history is an asset that younger opponents simply cannot replicate.

Prajwal has competed across 6 different regions of the country (Midwest, NE, NW, NorCal, SoCal, South), demonstrating a willingness to travel and test the game against diverse styles of play from coast to coast.

With 14 seeded entries across the career, Prajwal consistently earns the respect of tournament committees — a testament to the results put up on the court.

With 6 seasons of competitive experience and 2 titles to show for it, Prajwal is a battle-hardened competitor whose journey is a testament to what dedication, talent, and love for the game can produce.
